checklistTemplates.name: Nama Standard Inspection Checklist
checklistTemplates.description: Standard compliance checklist for all Nama water infrastructure inspections

checklistItems.text: Condition of equipment used by the contractor
Overall compliance with Nama HSE standards
Compliance of excavation works with specified pipe diameter
Installation of warning tape above pipeline
Ground leveling, soil compaction, removal of rocks
Flushing pipeline after installation and before meter
Contractor workers' compliance with wearing PPE
